task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Approval Queue** (Level 7)

Build an approval queue. Employees submit requests (title, description, amount). The request starts as 'pending'. A logged-in approver can update the status to 'approved' or 'rejected' (this requires auth). Need: POST /api/requests (public submit), GET /api/requests (list all), GET /api/requests/pending (filtered list), PUT /api/requests/:id (update, auth required).

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  description
  amount (number), default 0
  status, default 'pending'

allow signup and login
owner is 'approver@example.com'

# Public endpoint - employees submit requests
when user sends request to /api/requests:
  validate request:
    title is text, required
  saved = save request to Requests
  send back saved with status 201

# List all requests
when user calls GET /api/requests:
  send back all Requests

# List pending requests only
when user calls GET /api/requests/pending:
  send back all Requests where status is 'pending'

# Update request status (requires login for approval)
when user sends changes to /api/requests/:id:
  requires login
  save changes to Requests
  send back 'updated'

page 'Submit Request' at '/':
  title = ''
  description = ''
  amount = 0
  
  section 'Submit New Request':
    'Title' as text input saved as title
    'Description' as text area saved as description
    'Amount' as number input saved as amount
    
    button 'Submit Request':
      send { title: title, description: description, amount: amount } as a new record to '/api/requests'

page 'Approval Queue' at '/approvals':
  requires login
  on page load get requests from '/api/requests'
  
  section 'Pending Requests':
    display requests as table
